data.title: Trump Reiterates Resolve To Make US The 'Crypto Capital': Critic Labels Idea Of Bitcoin Reserve Legislation 'Absurd'
data.description: President Donald Trump reiterated his administration's resolve to make the U.S. the "cryptocurrency capital of the world" on Wednesday.

data.title: Trump Administration Orders Sweeping Pentagon Cuts: Palantir, Lockheed Martin, General Dynamics Among Stocks On Watch
data.description: The defense sector is on watch after the Trump administration ordered senior officials at the Pentagon and throughout the U.S. military to prepare for sweeping budget cuts.

data.title: Two Dead After Planes Collide Near Arizona's Marana Regional Airport
data.description: Two small planes collided midair near Marana Regional Airport in Arizona on Wednesday, killing two people, the National Transportation Safety Board said.

data.title: Colombia Considers Allowing Cannabis Imports: Experts Say It Makes No Sense
data.description: Colombia is considering importing dried cannabis flower from Canada, but industry experts warn it could harm local producers.
